patternCandidates.name: Link Validation Workflow
patternCandidates.description: validate_links.yml + scripts/validate/links.py (273 lines) + tests (172 lines). Scheduled + on-push URL liveness checking using Python requests.
patternCandidates.relevance_to_home: Transferable for docs/*, skill-indexes, README, EXTRACTIONS.md link checking.

patternCandidates.name: Structured Catalog Format (enum columns)
patternCandidates.description: API|Description|Auth|HTTPS|CORS table format with constrained enum values. Machine-parseable and human-readable.
patternCandidates.relevance_to_home: Reference if JASON-OS publishes a skill/tool catalog.

patternCandidates.name: Format Validation Script Pattern
patternCandidates.description: format.py (277 lines) with regex-based format enforcement, category structure validation, alphabetical ordering. Simpler version of patterns:check.

knowledgeCandidates.name: Celebrity stagnation with infrastructure (cross-repo)
knowledgeCandidates.description: Second data point alongside codecrafters. Same trajectory but WITH validation scripts, CI, tests. Proves automation alone doesn't prevent stagnation — you also need active maintenance. Merge with codecrafters stagnation entry.
knowledgeCandidates.relevance_to_home: Reinforces: quality infrastructure is necessary but not sufficient. Active maintenance is the key differentiator.

knowledgeCandidates.name: Validation without maintenance trap
knowledgeCandidates.description: Format validation scripts ensure structural integrity of new entries, but don't ensure entries are current, links are live, or categories are relevant. The missing piece is lifecycle management.
knowledgeCandidates.relevance_to_home: Applies to your own automation — patterns:check prevents format decay but doesn't prevent content decay.

contentCandidates.name: Google Calendar API
contentCandidates.relevance_to_home: Direct SoNash integration candidate. OAuth via Firebase Auth. Milestones, meetings, check-ins.

contentCandidates.name: Open-Meteo Weather API (no auth)
contentCandidates.relevance_to_home: Zero-friction weather data for mood-weather correlation journaling.

contentCandidates.name: Google Cloud Natural Language API
contentCandidates.relevance_to_home: Journal sentiment analysis. Same cloud ecosystem as Firebase.

contentCandidates.name: validate_links.yml workflow
contentCandidates.relevance_to_home: 29-line daily link checker. Port to sonash for docs/SKILL_INDEX/EXTRACTIONS link integrity.

antiPatternCandidates.name: Sponsor-first README pattern
antiPatternCandidates.description: 10 APILayer promoted APIs before community content. Erodes trust. If JASON-OS has partners, keep them separate from the content index.
antiPatternCandidates.relevance_to_home: If JASON-OS ever has sponsors or partners.

antiPatternCandidates.name: Validation without maintenance trap
antiPatternCandidates.description: Format validation scripts ensure structural integrity but not content freshness. Missing piece: lifecycle management. patterns:check prevents format decay but not content decay.
antiPatternCandidates.relevance_to_home: Applies to your own automation. Validation is necessary but not sufficient.

cross_repo_connections.detail: Both curated lists with celebrity stagnation. public-apis has validation infrastructure; codecrafters doesn't. Proves automation alone doesn't prevent stagnation.
